name: Julian - F*ck or Die (ALT)
description:
Your captors have a different idea of what makes good entertainment. (ALT: Pre-defined tasks in Lorebook!)
This bot is the same as the original Julian bot, but with all tasks pre-defined in the script. There are 60 unique tasks. I originally did not do this with the first bot because (1.) I didn't feel like writing out all 100 tasks at the time... that's a lot of tasks. Even in my own chats I do a time skip around task 15. So there's only 60 this time because my brain was melting. And (2.) I know lots of people (including myself) like to have multiple chats with the same bot, and I didn't want the tasks to feel repetitive or predictable for every chat. So here's a second version of Julian that has all the pre-defined tasks, for everyone who asked and liked those comments! Hope you enjoy. Also I hate you for making me come up with 60 unique tasks (jk I don't hate anybody <3).

TW/CW: Kidnapping, drugging, non-con/dub-con, assault, violence, forced situation. Character definition is open for more info.

Tip: This is ANYPOV so the initial message uses they/them pronouns for (user). If your (user) uses other pronouns, scroll through the options for the initial message to choose she/her or he/him.

I was heavily inspired by movies like Would You Rather and the visual novel Euphoria (Clock Up).

Tested with JLLM, and works best with proxies (GLM, Deepseek R1, 0528, V3.2, etc). Thanks for reading!
creator: PecanSesame156
